parts.label: Primary Structure (3U)
parts.spec: 3U CubeSat primary frame, Al 7075, PC/104 standoffs, deployable rail guide grooves (CDS spec)

parts.label: Solar Panel x 4 (deploy)
parts.spec: Deployable solar panel wing, 3U size, spring-loaded hinge, burn-wire release, deployment damper

parts.label: Antenna Deployer x 2
parts.spec: Tape-spring UHF/S-band antenna deployer, stowed flat, burn-wire release, latching tab

parts.label: Reaction Wheel x 3
parts.spec: Small reaction wheel assembly, brushless motor, momentum 0.005-0.05 Nms, isolation mount

parts.label: Star Tracker Mount
parts.spec: Star tracker optical bench mount, CTE-matched, baffled sun shield, line-of-sight +-1deg

parts.label: Payload Optics Bench
parts.spec: EO payload optics bench, thermal stability, optical baffles, focal plane interface, lens mounts

parts.label: Cold Gas Thruster x 4
parts.spec: Cold gas propulsion thruster bracket, 4 thrusters cross-pattern, 50mN class, plumbing manifold

parts.label: Separation Spring Plate
parts.spec: P-POD or ISIPOD separation interface plate, spring pusher contact, kill switch arm

parts.label: EPS Solar Charging Module
parts.spec: EPS solar charging subsystem: solar_panel_face inputs, removable battery_tray, eps_board_slot, power_connector keying, service cover, mass budget <480g

parts.label: CDH Avionics Stack
parts.spec: Command/data handling avionics stack: obc_board, stack_harness, debug_port_access, board standoffs, connector labels, grounding point, mass budget <260g

parts.label: Thermal Path / Radiator Strap Evidence
parts.spec: Thermal_path closure module: radiator_face, thermal_strap_note, vent_hole, battery-to-frame conduction pad, service-visible thermal datum, inspection label, mass budget <120g

parts.label: Integration Harness + Datum Spine
parts.spec: Integration_harness closure spine with harness_channel, connector_keying, assembly_datum pads, routing clips, service hatch, reciprocal interface labels, inspection checklist marks

requirements: Provide a 3U CubeSat primary frame with deployable rail guide grooves and PC/104 standoffs.
Ensure structural integrity under launch and deployment loads.
Maintain thermal management for internal electronics.
Offer service access for maintenance and repair.

generated_parts.label: Primary Structure (3U)
generated_parts.spec: 3U CubeSat primary frame, Al 7075, PC/104 standoffs, deployable rail guide grooves (CDS spec)

requirements: Provide a 3U CubeSat primary frame with deployable rail guide grooves and PC/104 standoffs.
Ensure structural integrity under launch and deployment loads.
Maintain thermal management for internal electronics.
Offer service access for maintenance and repair.

verify.rule: Ensure all required fields are present and filled.
Ensure the mass budget is consistent with the geometry.
Ensure P0 internal_feature_targets are present in part_tree/geometry_ops.
Ensure interfaces are reciprocal and named with exact neighboring subsystem labels.
Ensure critical joints have visible locking/preload evidence.
Ensure boundary conditions are specified for downstream CFD/FEA.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to extreme temperature cycling.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management strategies such as heat sinks and thermal vias.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure under launch vibration.
risk.mit: Conduct finite element analysis (FEA) to validate structural integrity.

risk.desc: Risk of deployment shock damaging the deployable rail guide.
risk.mit: Design deployable rail guide with shock absorbers and reinforcement.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient service access for maintenance.
risk.mit: Ensure all critical components have removable access panels.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal expansion mismatch between Al 7075 and CFRP.
risk.mit: Use thermal expansion compensating materials or design for expansion.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Primary frame, deployable rail guide grooves, PC/104 standoffs
physics_paths: Load: Structural loads from solar pressure, launch vibration, and deployment shock
Thermal: Heat transfer from internal electronics to external radiators
Service: Access to avionics, battery, and payload modules for maintenance
integration_opportunities: Antenna mounting points for external antennas
Deployable rail guide grooves for satellite deployment
verification_focus: Structural integrity under launch and deployment loads
Service access for maintenance and repair

generated_parts.label: Solar Panel x 4 (deploy)
generated_parts.spec: Deployable solar panel wing, 3U size, spring-loaded hinge, burn-wire release, deployment damper

requirements.description: Deployable solar panel wing, 3U size, spring-loaded hinge, burn-wire release, deployment damper
requirements.mission_variant: polar orbit Earth-observation, -40°C thermal design emphasis, radiation-hardened components
requirements.granularity_rule: decompose into 5-9 meaningful internal child features
requirements.op_diversity_rule: each child has at least 4 dedicated geometry_ops
requirements.coordinate_distribution_rule: ops args.at [x,y,z] distributed across subsystem volume
requirements.interface_rule: at least three adjacent-module interfaces or mounting datums and at least three negative/service features
requirements.reciprocal_interface_rule: name exact neighboring subsystem labels with joint family back
requirements.joint_evidence_rule: critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence
requirements.training_quality_rule: part_tree children and geometry_ops mutually traceable by id/name
requirements.tolerance_stack_up_rule: include stack_up_mm and fit_class for each adjacent_interface
requirements.dimensional_realism_rule: dimensions physically plausible for subsystem scale

verify.value: All required fields are present.
verify.rule: schema must be complete.

verify.value: mass_est_g: 1500
verify.rule: mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are present in part_tree/geometry_ops.
verify.rule: P0 internal_feature_targets must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.

verify.value: All interfaces have matching connection_type, DOF, and clearance_mm.
verify.rule: Interfaces must have matching connection_type, DOF, and clearance_mm.

verify.value: All critical joints have visible locking evidence and preload intent.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible locking evidence and preload intent.
Boundary conditions must include fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

risk.desc: Deployment shock may exceed design limits.
risk.mit: Conduct shock testing and adjust deployment mechanism if necessary.

risk.desc: Solar panel may not fully deploy in extreme thermal conditions.
risk.mit: Implement thermal expansion compensation in the deployment mechanism.

risk.desc: Burn-wire release may fail due to radiation exposure.
risk.mit: Use radiation-resistant materials for burn-wire components.

risk.desc: Deployment damper may not provide sufficient damping in high solar pressure.
risk.mit: Increase damping force or redesign damper mechanism.

risk.desc: Separation spring may lose tension over time.
risk.mit: Select a spring material with higher fatigue resistance.

physics_paths.path: Solar pressure -> Deployable Wing -> Deployment Hinge -> CubeSat Body
physics_paths.description: Solar pressure on deployable wing generates force transmitted to deployment hinge and CubeSat body.

physics_paths.path: Electrical Power -> Solar Panel -> Wiring Harness -> CubeSat Power Distribution
physics_paths.description: Electrical power generated by solar panel is routed through wiring harness to CubeSat power distribution.

physics_paths.path: Sunlight -> Solar Panel -> Thermal Management -> CubeSat Thermal Control
physics_paths.description: Sunlight heats solar panel and thermal management system dissipates heat to maintain CubeSat thermal control.

physics_paths.path: Deployment Mechanism -> Solar Panel -> CubeSat Body
physics_paths.description: Deployment mechanism actuates solar panel, moving it relative to CubeSat body.

physics_paths.path: Ground Station -> CubeSat -> Solar Panel -> CubeSat Body
physics_paths.description: Ground station commands deployment of solar panel, which is monitored and controlled by CubeSat onboard systems.

integration_opportunities.description: Integration of deployable wing mechanism with CubeSat body and solar panel.
Routing of electrical harness for power distribution from solar panel to CubeSat body.
Integration of thermal management system to dissipate heat from solar panel.

verification_focus.description: Verification of mechanical integrity of deployable wing mechanism.
Verification of electrical connectivity from solar panel to CubeSat power distribution.
Verification of thermal management system performance.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on the antenna deployer hinge during extreme temperature cycles.
risk.mit: Implement thermal expansion joints and use materials with similar thermal expansion coefficients.

risk.desc: Risk of RF signal degradation due to inadequate shielding in the harness path.
risk.mit: Add shielding to the harness path and verify signal integrity during testing.

risk.desc: Risk of improper torque application during assembly leading to joint failure.
risk.mit: Train assembly technicians on proper torque application and conduct regular inspections.

risk.desc: Risk of antenna misalignment during deployment due to hinge wear.
risk.mit: Use high-quality bearings and conduct regular maintenance checks.

risk.desc: Risk of service access obstruction due to cable routing.
risk.mit: Ensure cable routing does not obstruct access panels and conduct regular inspections.
